privileged_info_summary: The task 'switch_student_section@1' uses OpenSIS v9.2, an open-source student information system. All test data is synthetic: Student 'Emily Watson' is created in the database during task setup (setup_task.sh line 79), not from a real dataset. The course 'Advanced Biology' (course code SCI404) is created during setup (line 55). The student is initially enrolled in the 'Morning Session' (lines 48, 91) and must be switched to the 'Afternoon Session' (line 49). Both sessions are created as database periods during setup. The verifier checks that the Morning Session is dropped (end_date <= today) and the Afternoon Session is active (end_date is null or > today), with no double-booking allowed.
